scripts.install:packages: npm install --workspace=@videri/shared && npm install --workspace=@videri/backend-api && npm install --workspace=@videri/backend-persistence && npm install --workspace=@videri/backend-notification
scripts.build:api: npm run build:shared && npm run build:api:only
scripts.build:persistence: npm run build:shared && npm run build:persistence:only
scripts.build:notification: npm run build:shared && npm run build:notification:only
scripts.build:all: npm run build:shared && npm run build:api:only && npm run build:persistence:only && npm run build:notification:only
scripts.test:all: npm run build:shared && npm run test:api && npm run test:persistence && npm run test:notification && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:cov: npm run test:api -- --coverage && npm run test:persistence -- --coverage && npm run test:notification -- --coverage
scripts.docker:build: npm run build:all && docker compose --env-file .env.dev build
